"Don't let the "molecular gastronomy" label on heavy cream powder scare you! It's a fantastic way to make your own healthier and tastier coffee creamer at home. 

I love creamy, sweet coffee, but store-bought creamers are full of unhealthy ingredients. I also dislike cold milk in my coffee. I wanted a delicious, hot creamer made with real ingredients.

That's how I discovered heavy cream powder! Here's my recipe:

* 1/3 heavy cream powder
* 1/3 non-instant low-fat milk powder
* 1/3 regular milk powder

For flavor, I add cocoa powder, vanilla powder, a touch of sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Feel free to use your preferred sweetener.

I blend everything until smooth and store it in airtight jars. The result is far superior to anything you can buy in stores!

The best part is the customization! Experiment with different ratios, flavors, and even essential oils to create your own unique blend. Your taste buds (and your body) will thank you!"
